name: Planes v2 Runtime Integration on Canonical IR
descriptions: Integrate runtime to consume canonical IR only with deterministic composition/order/hit-test behavior.
success_criteria: Deterministic transform/render/hit-test/compositing rules are enforced and tested.

required_commands: uv run pytest tests -k "planes_runtime_ir_ingest or planes_determinism or planes_backend_normalization" -q

ci_required_checks: uv run pytest tests -k "planes_runtime_ir_ingest or planes_determinism or planes_backend_normalization" -q
